user_message: The CSA escalated Alpine Ski House to me -- can you build the narrative?

input_artifacts.content:
From: Brian Yamamoto <brian.yamamoto@alpineskihou.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-15 09:42 EST
Subject: Follow-up: forecast prep Review

Just checking in on the forecast prep proposal. Our COO is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Brian Yamamoto <brian.yamamoto@alpineskihou.com>
Date: 2024-02-25 09:44 EST
Subject: Follow-up: forecast prep Review

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with forecast prep. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Brian Yamamoto <brian.yamamoto@alpineskihou.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-12 14:11 EST
Subject: forecast prep - Action Required

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with forecast prep. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF16-A trap (Mismatches tone (formal where casual was established)); produces complete Thread summary, key commitments/asks identified, waiting-on-whom assessment, draft response matching
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF16-A failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF16-A failure mode (Mismatches tone (formal where casual was established))
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct forecast prep decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF16-A -- Mismatches tone (formal where casual was established)
